Transcrição Completa: How To Deal With More Rejection

 

Conversa

 

[00:00][music] You're going to get a lot more nos than you're going to get yeses.

 

[00:05]Unless you're honing your sales expertise through time and continuing to increase the open rates, the response rates, the closing rates, you will get to a point where you'll have more than 50% closing ratio.

 

[00:18]Especially when you have the right people that are closing, you're really honed in on pitching the right people and getting people primed and ready for the close.

 

[00:27]Your numbers will go up through time, but when you're first starting off, especially when you're first getting started, you're gonna have a lot more nos than you're going to have yeses.

 

[00:37]So, you got to understand the numbers, okay? Numbers play into your favor. They play against you on a day-to-day basis.

 

[00:45]The reason you hear me recommending is to have at least 100 communications per day.

 

[00:51]That means perfect cold video pitches. That means you having enough follow-ups per day to simply have the statistical odds in your favor to have some yeses squeezed out from that.

 

[01:03]Because keep in mind when you first get started, for every, let's say, hundred people that you reach out to, maybe 80 of them won't even respond.

 

[01:13]Let's say out of the 20 that you get to respond, let's say 18 of them will just say, "No, I'm not interested."

 

[01:21]But for every hundred that you get, you're going to have two that end up saying yes.

 

[01:26]So, your odds become increasingly in your favor each day that you're consistent with keeping your numbers up.

 

[01:33]But just keep in mind, it's a mental frame on sales that you will expect. It's an expectation. You will expect more nos than yeses.

 

[01:43]It's quite simple, but a necessary way to see the world and all the data that you're going to get while you're operating in the sales trenches.

 

 

📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO

 

NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS:

100 comunicações por dia (mínimo recomendado)

50%+ taxa de fechamento (objetivo alcançável com experiência)

80 de 100 não respondem (taxa de não-resposta inicial)

20 de 100 respondem (taxa de resposta)

18 de 20 dizem "não" após responder

2 de 100 dizem "sim" (taxa de conversão inicial: 2%)

 

ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:

Aprimoramento contínuo de expertise em vendas

Aumento progressivo de open rates, response rates e closing rates

Qualificação e preparação adequada de prospects antes do fechamento

Cold video pitches perfeitos como estratégia principal

Sistema de follow-ups estruturado diariamente

Volume estatístico como vantagem competitiva

 

ESTRUTURA:

Framework mental: Expectativa de mais "nãos" do que "sins"

Jogo de números: Consistência diária determina resultados

Evolução progressiva: Iniciantes vs. vendedores experientes

Processo de maturação: Números melhoram com o tempo e prática

 

DADOS FINANCEIROS:

Não mencionados diretamente neste vídeo

 

DURAÇÃO: 01:50 FORMATO: Vídeo educacional/treinamento de vendas com música de fundo
